race.comment: Wide open. BRAVE DANZA (2) had a good run and won well over this route last start, beating the bolter SHE'S GOT THE CASH (14) who started 100-1 and ran on well for second. SHE'S GOT THE CASH does meet BRAVE DANZA much better at the weights and draw well but both are strong hopes again. ROCKETTE (13) won dominantly on debut at Pakenham in strong time, good against the older horses at Sale last start over 1736m when boxing on well for second. Up to 2000m and back against her own age, she should go close. SIRIUSLY HOT (3) set a strong gallop over a mile at Sandown Hillside last start and kept running, have to respect.
